## JOIN OUR TEAM
##  Join Our Team at SCALINQ!
Explore our open positions here and be part of the future of quantum technology! We are a team of passionate engineers and researchers developing innovative hardware solutions to advance quantum computing. Our solutions support quantum developers and research institutes worldwide. To grow and thrive, we combine technical excellence with business development in marketing, sales, and HR. Join us as we push the boundaries of quantum computing!
[ Explore Our Career Opportunities ](https://careers.scalinq.com)
## A diverse team

## Passion
A shared desire to enable quantum computing
## Hear from our team
Discover what our employees have to say about working at ScalinQ. From company culture to career growth, hear real stories from our team.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Quote_icon.png)
Why do you work at SCALINQ? 
“I was born too late for the digital computer revolution. But I was born just in time to join quantum computers. Every day is a challenge the world didn’t know before and I have a front-row seat in this cutting edge field. Growing with SCALINQ is an adventure every nerd dreams about.” 
Ravindu 
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Quote_icon.png)
What is it like to work at SCALINQ? 
“Working at Scalinq feels like being in the middle of a vibrant mosaic where cultures and ideas from all over the world come together and spark with energy. There’s something magical about building from the ground up, leaving your own mark, and daring to try and understand new things every day.” 
Madeleine 
## Our Values at SCALINQ!
At SCALINQ, we believe that true innovation is born around the campfire of collaboration and curiosity. It’s here, in the warmth of shared ideas, that we dare to dream big and challenge the boundaries of quantum technology. We’re not just building cutting-edge hardware solutions; we’re weaving the future of quantum computing from the threads of research and real-world impact.
Driven by creativity, trust, and teamwork, we come together with a shared sense of purpose. We boldly tackle the impossible, but we also move forward with a deep sense of humility, aware of the uncharted waters ahead. We know the road is long and filled with challenges, but it’s this journey that shapes us.
As we join forces with research institutes and quantum developers across the world, we remain open, ready to learn, and committed to building lasting partnerships. Here, every idea matters, and every contribution helps us make a meaningful impact on the world. So come, sit by the fire with us, and be part of a team that’s ready to shape the future of quantum computing together.
## Sounds like a place for you?
Explore our open positions and be part of the future of quantum technology! We are a passionate team developing innovative hardware solutions for quantum computing. By combining technical excellence with business development, we support research institutes and quantum developers worldwide. Join us on this exciting journey!
[ Explore Our Career Opportunities ](https://careers.scalinq.com)
![SCALINQ logo 2024 white](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/SCALINQ-logo-2024-white.png)
We aim to solve the inevitable problems when scaling quantum bits in superconducting and spin-qubit-based processors through high density components. Stemming from research, we develop novel hardware solutions which simplify the advancements of quantum computers. We offer solutions to research institutes and quantum computing developers worldwide.
© 2025 SCALINQ. All rights reserved.

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At SCALINQ, we believe that true innovation is born around the campfire of collaboration and curiosity. It’s here, in the warmth of shared ideas, that we dare to dream big and challenge the boundaries of quantum technology. We’re not just building cutting-edge hardware solutions; we’re weaving the future of quantum computing from the threads of research and real-world impact.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Driven by creativity, trust, and teamwork, we come together with a shared sense of purpose. We boldly tackle the impossible, but we also move forward with a deep sense of humility, aware of the uncharted waters ahead. We know the road is long and filled with challenges, but it’s this journey that shapes us.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">As we join forces with research institutes and quantum developers across the world, we remain open, ready to learn, and committed to building lasting partnerships. Here, every idea matters, and every contribution helps us make a meaningful impact on the world. So come, sit by the fire with us, and be part of a team that’s ready to shape the future of quantum computing together.</span></p>								</div>
